args.content:
Hawaii Packing List

Based on Emma Johnson's Vacation Itinerary

Essential Items:
  - Swimwear (at least 2 sets)
  - Sunscreen (reef-safe recommended)
  - Sunglasses
  - Hat/cap for sun protection
  - Beach towels
  - Flip-flops/sandals

Clothing:
  - Casual outfits (t-shirts, shorts, sundresses)
  - Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
  - Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike)
  - Workout clothes (if planning to exercise)
  - Nice outfit (for dinner at a nicer restaurant)

Electronics:
  - Camera (with extra batteries/memory cards)
  - Phone and charger
  - Waterproof phone case (for snorkeling/kayaking)
  - Portable power bank

Toiletries:
  - Toothbrush and toothpaste
  - Shampoo and conditioner
  - Body wash
  - Razor
  - Medications
  - First aid kit

Documents:
  - Passport/ID
  - Flight tickets
  - Hotel reservation details
  - Travel insurance information
  - Credit cards and cash

Optional Items:
  - Snorkeling gear (if you have your own)
  - Beach bag
  - Books/magazines for relaxation
  - Journal to document your trip
  - Gifts/souvenirs to bring back
